name: team stat with per_team_quarter
description: Test case for team stat with per_team_quarter
expected_query: with "t97ab2d9ce4af5058a819a31b0f75bfc6" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(nfl_plays.esbid, qtr)) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" in ('PASS', 'RUSH') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."pos_team" as "team_code", SUM(pass_yds) AS m_8ccc10433265 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by nfl_plays.pos_team) select "player"."pid", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01.m_8ccc10433265) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t97ab2d9ce4af5058a819a31b0f75bfc6.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2023 left join "t97ab2d9ce4af5058a819a31b0f75bfc6" on "t97ab2d9ce4af5058a819a31b0f75bfc6"."off" = "player_year_teams"."team" left join "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01" on "rate_aggregate_929d5196ac01"."team_code" = "player_year_teams"."team" group by "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
